description: Menace of Destruction (MOD) is a Hmong street gang founded in 1988 in Fresno, California. Originally called Masters of Destruction, it is one of the oldest active Asian street gangs in Northern California and the largest Hmong gang in the United States. The gang is involved in murders, shootings, drug trafficking (marijuana and methamphetamine), and weapon trafficking. It is active in California, the Midwestern United States, and other areas with large Hmong communities.

country_links.evidence_quote: Today, it is active in California , Midwestern United States and many places with large Hmong communities.
country_links.context: The organization is active in California, Midwestern United States, and other places with large Hmong communities, and has its largest presence in California.
